title: ARCHIVED – Notice - Visa Services at the Canadian Embassy in Libya (Tripoli) re-opens - Canada.ca
content:
## ARCHIVED – Notice - Visa Services at the Canadian Embassy in Libya (Tripoli) re-opens

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.
January 17, 2012 — Please note that the Visa and Immigration Section at the Canadian Embassy in Libya (Tripoli) is now accepting temporary resident applications to visit, study or work temporarily in Canada.  All permanent resident applications should continue to be sent to the visa office in Paris . For more information, visit the website of the Embassy of Canada in Libya .
